channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zozibini Tunzi hosts Miss Universe Zimbabwe 2026 in fashion-forward style
item.description: via News24 #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: News24

item.title: Meet Zimbabwe’s first female helicopter pilot who defied odds in South Africa to earn her license
item.description: via Face2Face Africa #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Face2Face Africa

item.title: EMA raises alarm over destruction of Harare wetlands
item.description: Alicia Kadzviti Herald Reporter HARARE’S wetlands are facing mounting pressure from housing developments and agricultural activities, threatening ecosystems that play a key role in water supply, purification and environmental protection,… #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Herald

item.title: NetOne powers Zimbabwe’s digital transformation as it marks 30 years @NetOneCellular
item.description: Gibson Mhaka ONE of the country’s largest mobile network operators, NetOne, has marked 30 years of operations, celebrating its transformation from Zimbabwe’s first cellular network provider into a key… via Herald #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Herald

item.title: Breaking Airline News: Air Zimbabwe Deploys Massive London Lifeline to Combat Severe Travel Chaos Across Southern African Transit Corridors
item.description: via Nomad Lawyer #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nomad Lawyer

item.title: The Tech Stack Will Decide ZEEX. The ZSE Has Been Quietly Building Toward It
item.description: Whether Zimbabwe’s new SME exchange works will come down to the technology it runs on. The ZSE has a decade-long modernisation record and a brand-new trading system finished months ago. The open question is what, exactly, ZEEX will be built on. via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Running out of gas ends in illegal sex: Man ‘lula lulas’ neighbour’s daughter while her mother cooks in the same house
item.description: The developing, family-friendly suburb of Charlotte Brook in Harare North has been thrust into the spotlight following a harrowing incident that exposes the dark intersection of Zimbabwe’s ongoing energy crisis and the vulnerability of children. In a case that has deeply unsettle via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe delegation leaves for China for Culture and Tourism Development seminar
item.description: via The Herald ZW #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald ZW

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs Set for Toyota Cup Showdown Against Zimbabwe Champions Scottland FC
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs Set for Toyota Cup Showdown Against Zimbabwe Champions Scottland FC Kaizer Chiefs will come up against a familiar pair of faces when they take on Zimbabwean champions Scottland FC in the third edition of the Toyota Cup at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium on July 26. The h via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: How a 42% reserve boost at one gold mine added $1 billion to Zimbabwe’s mining ambitions

item.title: VARUN BEVERAGES RECRUITS FUTURE LEADERS FROM ZIMBABWE COLLEGES AS RJ CORP AND PARTNERS EXPLORE GREENFIELD DAIRY INVESTMENT IN ZIMBABWE
item.description: US$650 Million Investment Vision Reinforces Confidence in Zimbabwe’s Long-Term Growth Potential Zimbabwe continues to attract long-term investment interest as RJ Corporation, its... via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Khama Billiat could face Kaizer Chiefs again — here’s how
item.description: A possible showdown between Khama Billiat and Kaizer Chiefs is generating excitement. Here’s what could happen next. The post Khama Billiat could face Kaizer Chiefs again — here’s how appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: ZimRights demands criminal probe, prosecutions over Budiriro sewer deaths
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Human Rights Association (ZimRights) has demanded an urgent criminal investigation and prosecution of those responsible for leaving an open sewage excavation site in Budiriro, where three people died after falling into a sewer pool. The victims included a young girl, via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Scottland FC to play Kaizer Chiefs in the 2026 Toyota Cup
item.description: SCOTTLAND FC has been confirmed as this year’s opponents for Kaizer Chiefs in the prestigious Toyota Cup. The match is scheduled to be played on the 26th of July at Royal Bafokeng Stadium in South Africa. Hosted by South African giants Kaizer Chiefs, the tournament will be markin via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mighty Warriors lose Four Nations Cup final to Zambia
item.description: THE Mighty Warriors’ quest for Four Nations Cup glory ended in disappointment after they suffered a 3-0 defeat to hosts Zambia in the final played at Levy Mwanawasa Stadium Tuesday evening. Zimbabwe were hoping to avenge their previous defeat to the Copper Queens, having also los via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe introduced the ’Friendship Bench.’ 18 years later, the U.S. is doing it, and it could be a game changer for mental health. @FriendshipBench
item.description: via Upworthy #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe, Malawi, Moza move to ease borders
item.description: Tapiwa Chirume AUTHORITIES in Zimbabwe, Malawi, and Mozambique are intensifying efforts to create seamless borders and improve the regional movement of goods.This... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your c via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Rhinos return to billionaire-backed Zimbabwe park after 1990s wipe out
item.description: Bloomberg Black rhinos are being reintroduced into a billionaire-backed national park in Zimbabwe’s Zambezi Valley three decades after almost all of them were evacuated to protect them from poachers. The number of black rhinos in the valley fell to 400 in the early 1990s from abo via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Batoka project to yield billions: ZIDA @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Oliver Kazunga Senior Reporter THE proposed US$4,25 billion Batoka Gorge Hydro-Electric Scheme is projected to generate US$53,5 billion in revenue and US$34,26 billion in profit over 25 years, positioning Zimbabwe... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald
